name: Witchcrafter Marka
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effects of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can Tribute this card from your hand or field; add 1 "Witchcrafter" Field or Continuous Spell from your Deck to your hand.
②：If a face-up "Witchcrafter" monster(s) you control leaves the field by an opponent's card effect while this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card (but banish it when it leaves the field), and if you do, Tribute 1 opponent's monster.

name: Witchcrafter Pupils
desc:
1 "Witchcrafter" monster + 1 Spellcaster monster
You can only use the ① and ② effects of this card's name each once per turn.
①：During the Main or Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Add 1 "Witchcrafter" Spell from your Deck to your hand.
● Reveal 1 "Witchcrafter" Normal or Quick-Play Spell in your hand; apply that Spell's activation effect.
②：During your End Phase: You can return 1 of your banished "Witchcrafter" cards to the GY.

name: Gaming Gamer GG
desc:
2 Level 4 Machine monsters
If this card is Special Summoned: You can change all monsters your opponent controls to Attack Position. If your opponent has a monster in their field or GY: You can detach 1 material from this card; send 1 Machine monster from your Deck/Extra Deck to the GY, then you can apply this effect.
● Choose 1 Machine Xyz Monster in your GY, and this card's name becomes that monster's name until the End Phase.
You can only use this effect of "Gaming Gamer GG" once per turn.

name: Fata Dragna
desc:
2 monsters with the same Type and Attribute, but different Levels
Your opponent cannot target Fusion Monsters you control with card effects. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Fusion Summon: You can Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck in Defense Position (but negate its effects, also return it to the Extra Deck during the End Phase), also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Fata Dragna" once per turn.

name: Genia of the Ring
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; Special Summon this card, also that target becomes a Spellcaster monster. The next time that target would be destroyed by card effect this turn, it is not destroyed, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Spellcaster monsters. If this card is Tributed, or banished, to activate a Spellcaster monster's effect: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Genia of the Ring" once per turn.

name: Checkker
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned if you control a monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Machine monster from your Deck whose ATK equals its own DEF, but return it to the hand during the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY and discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 "Iron Rubble Token" (Machine/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0), but it cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, or Link Summon. You can only use each effect of "Checkker" once per turn.

name: Rustin Mammoth
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can banish Machine Link Monsters from your Extra Deck whose combined Link Ratings equal exactly 5; Special Summon this card. You can target 1 card you control and 1 card your opponent controls; return them to the hand. This is a Quick Effect if this card is linked to a Link-3 or higher Machine Link Monster. You can only use each effect of "Rustin Mammoth" once per turn.

name: Officiating Reverie
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can discard 1 other card; Special Summon this card. If an Xyz Monster(s) is sent to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 Zombie monster from your GY. During the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was banished: You can target 1 Zombie Xyz Monster you control; attach this banished card to it. You can only use each effect of "Officiating Reverie" once per turn.

name: Officiator of Doom Samuel
desc:
2 Level 6 monsters
During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Zombie monster in your GY; Special Summon it, then you can negate the effects of 1 monster your opponent controls with ATK less than or equal to that monster. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 monster in either GY; shuffle it into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Officiator of Doom Samuel" once per turn.

name: VIP Whale
desc: You can Tribute additional monsters when you Tribute Summon this card face-up. If this card is Tribute Summoned: You can place VIP Counters on this card equal to the number of monsters Tributed for its Tribute Summon. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can remove 1 VIP Counter from this card; toss a coin and call it. If you call it right, negate that effect. If you call it wrong, this card's original ATK becomes halved until the end of this turn.

name: Evolved Daneen
desc:
"Returned Dino Daneen" + 1 Dinosaur monster
If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "GMX" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Evolved Daneen" once per turn. If you excavate a card(s) by a "GMX" card effect: You can activate the following effect, based on where this card is at activation (but you can only use each effect of "Evolved Daneen" once per turn);
● Field: Gain 1500 LP.
● GY: Special Summon this card.

name: GMX - COMPREX
desc:
1 "GMX" monster + 2+ Dinosaur monsters
Gains these effects based on the number of Dinosaur monsters used as Fusion Material for this card.
● 3+: Your opponent cannot target this card with card effects.
● 4+: Can make up to 3 attacks during each Battle Phase.
● 5+: Each time your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s), they lose 800 LP.
Once per turn, if you excavate a card(s) by a "GMX" card effect: You can destroy all other monsters on the field.

name: GMX 55th Experiment Report
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Dinosaur Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck using monsters from your hand or field. If your opponent controls a monster, you can also use 1 "GMX" monster in your Deck as material. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; excavate the top cards of your Deck until you excavate a "GMX" card, add that "GMX" card to your hand, also shuffle the rest into the Deck. You can only use 1 "GMX 55th Experiment Report" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

name: Anti-GMX Final Experiment
desc: Activate only if you control a "GMX" monster. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect on the field (except during the Damage Step): You can excavate the top 5 cards of your Deck, then if you excavated a "GMX" card(s), negate that activated effect, also place all the excavated cards on the top or bottom of the Deck in any order.

name: Shade the Obscure
desc:
Pendulum Scale = 11
[ Pendulum Effect ]
You cannot Pendulum Summon, except Pendulum Monsters (this effect cannot be negated). If a monster(s) with 1000 ATK or less is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can return this card to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Shade the Obscure" once per turn.
----------------------------------------
[ Monster Effect ]
If you have a card in your Pendulum Zone and this card is in your hand: You can Special Summon this card. You can pay 1000 LP; destroy 1 Pendulum Monster Card in your hand or face-up field, then you can add 1 Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your face-up Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Shade the Obscure" once per turn.

name: GMX Partner Selandea
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "GMX" monster or 1 Dinosaur monster from your hand, also you can only attack directly with "GMX" monsters for the rest of this turn. If this card is Special Summoned by a monster effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "GMX" or Dinosaur monster from your hand, GY, or banishment in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "GMX Partner Selandea" once per turn.

name: GMX Suppression Squad
desc: If this card is in your hand and you control a "GMX" monster or a Dinosaur monster: You can Special Summon this card. You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; excavate the top cards of your Deck until you excavate a Dinosaur monster, send that Dinosaur monster to the GY, and if you do, the targeted monster becomes a Dinosaur monster (until the end of this turn), also shuffle the rest into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "GMX Suppression Squad" once per turn.

name: GMX Lab #5
desc: Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when you Normal or Special Summon a "GMX" monster(s). During your Main Phase: You can Set 1 "GMX" Spell/Trap from your Deck, except "GMX Lab #5", then place 1 card from your hand on top of the Deck. You can only use this effect of "GMX Lab #5" once per turn.

name: Phara, the Goddess of the Beginning
desc:
You can only use the ①, ②, and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can reveal this card and 1 Spell/Trap in your hand; neither player can activate cards or effects in response to the activation of a card with the same name as the revealed Spell/Trap, or its effects, until the end of the next turn.
②：If this card is sent from the hand or field to the GY by Spell/Trap effect: You can Special Summon this card.
③：If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can take control of the 1 monster your opponent controls with the highest ATK (your choice, if tied).

name: S-Force Signus
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "S-Force" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "S-Force Signus", then if an opponent's monster is in this card's column, you can draw 1 card.
②：If an opponent's monster activates its effect in the same column as your monster: You can make all "S-Force" monsters you currently control gain 1000 ATK.

name: S-Force Nightslayer
desc:
2 monsters, including an "S-Force" monster
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "S-Force" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.
②：(Quick Effect): You can banish this card you control and 1 "S-Force" card from your hand; Special Summon 1 "S-Force" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck, except "S-Force Nightslayer".

name: S-Force Mystify
desc:
2+ monsters, including an "S-Force" monster.
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：While an opponent's monster is in this card's column, your opponent cannot target this card with card effects, also they cannot special summon monsters using activated monster effects
②：(Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster on the field; move it to another of its controller's Main Monster Zones.

name: S-Force Origin
desc:
You can only use each effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Special Summon 1 "S-Force" monster from your hand, GY, or banishment, but banish it when it leaves the field.
②：If another card(s) becomes banished while this card is in your GY: You can banish it; take 2 "S-Force" cards from your Deck, except "S-Force Origin", banish 1 of them, also send the other to the GY.

name: S-Force Sorted World
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If you would banish a card(s) from the hand to activate the effect of an "S-Force" monster you control, you can send 1 "S-Force" card from your Deck to the GY instead, except "S-Force Sorted World".
②：If another card(s) becomes banished: You can target 1 card in your opponent's field or GY; banish it, then you can move 1 of your "S-Force" monsters to another of your Main Monster Zones.

name: Pot of Procrastination
desc: ①：You cannot activate "Pot of Procrastination" for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, also draw cards equal to the number of cards your opponent controls, then if you drew 2 or more, place the same number -1 from your hand on the bottom of the Deck in any order.

name: Dark-Eyes Illusionist Faceless Mage
desc:
①：You can discard this card, then activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of this card's name once per turn);
● Place 1 "Mind Scan" from your hand or Deck on your field face-up.
● Add 1 other monster from your GY to your hand that mentions "Toon World", then you can Special Summon it, ignoring its Summoning conditions.
②：If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle.

name: Mind Scan
desc:
Temporaly Unaivalable

You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：While you have a "Toon" card in your field or GY, your opponent must play with their hand revealed, also you can look at their Set cards at any time.
②：If you have a Toon monster and a "Toon" Spell in your field and/or GY: You can declare the name of 1 card that was not activated, and did not activate its effect, in this Chain; negate the activated effects of cards with that original name until the end of this turn while this card is face-up on the field.

name: Melffy Rabbys
desc:
You can only use 1 of the ① and ② effect of this card's name per turn, and only once that turn.
①：If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can Fusion Summon 1 "Melffy" monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field.
②：If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Melffy" monster from your Deck to your hand, then if it is a Normal Monster, you can Special Summon any number of Beast monsters from your hand.

name: Excited Melffys
desc:
1 "Melffy" monster + 1 Beast monster
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can target an equal number of "Melffy" cards you control and cards your opponent controls; return them to the hand.
②：If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s), or this card is targeted for an attack: You can target 1 Beast monster in your GY; decrease this card's Level by 2, and if you do, Special Summon that monster.

name: Melffy God Mommy
desc:
3+ Level 2 Beast monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Melffy God Mommy" by using "Melffy Mommy" you control (transfer its material).
①：If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Melffy" Spell/Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand.
②：Gains ATK equal to the combined ATK and DEF of all "Melffy" monsters attached to it.
③：You can detach 5 materials from the card; return all cards your opponent controls to the hand.

name: Melffy Statues Game
desc:
You cannot Special Summon the turn you activate this card, except "Melffy" monsters. You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：Add up to 4 "Melffy" monsters with different names from your Deck to your hand, then it becomes the End Phase of this turn.
②：You can banish this card from your GY, then target 2 "Melffy" cards in your GY, except "Melffy Statues Game"; add 1 of them to your hand, and if you do, place the other on the bottom of the Deck.

name: Exciting Melffy Time
desc:
You can only use the ① and (②) effects of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Target 1 "Melffy" monster in your field or GY; return it to the hand, then you can Fusion Summon 1 Beast monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field.
②：If you control a "Melffy" Xyz Monster: You can banish this card from your GY; your "Melffy" monsters Special Summoned from the Extra Deck are unaffected by your opponent's activated effects this turn.

name: Corrupted Ritual Records
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effects of this card's name once per turn.
①：Reveal 1 Ritual Spell in your hand or Deck and add 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck to your hand.
②：If a face-up Ritual Monster(s) you control leaves the field by card effect while this card is in your GY, and you now control no face-up non-Ritual Monsters: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Dark Tyranno
desc:
You can only use this card name's ① and ③ effects once per turn each.
①：During your Main Phase, if a Spell Card or effect was activated this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.
②：Can attack directly if the only monsters your opponent controls are in Defense Position.
③：If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 Level 8 or higher Dinosaur monster from your Deck to your hand, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon that monster from your hand.

name: Arcana Force XII – The Hanged Man
desc:
You can only use this card name's ① effect once per turn.
①：When a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "Arcana Force" monster from your hand in Defense Position.
②：If this card is Summoned: Toss a coin and this card gains the appropriate effect.
● Heads: Destroy 1 monster you control, and if you do, take damage equal to its original ATK.
● Tails: Destroy 1 monster your opponent controls, and if you do, inflict damage to them equal to its original ATK.

name: Candelado the Light Phantom Beast
desc:
You can only use this card name's ① and ③ effects once per turn each.
①：You can discard 2 other cards; Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add 1 card from your Deck to your hand that has a coin tossing effect.
②：Gains 1000 ATK/DEF for each card in your hand.
③：When a card or effect is activated that includes an effect that adds a card(s) from the Deck to the hand (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect.

name: Plasma Warrior Eitom
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "Magna Warrior" card.)
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand or GY) by Tributing 1 Level 7 or higher monster. You can only Special Summon "Plasma Warrior Eitom" once per turn this way.
①：Once per turn: You can send 1 "Magnet Warrior" or "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Plasma Warrior Eitom"; for the rest of this turn, this card's original ATK becomes 1500, also it can attack directly.

name: White Knights Lord
desc:
You can only use this card name's ① effect once per turn.
①：You can banish 3 monsters from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can apply 1 of these effects.
● Special Summon 1 "White Knights" or "White Night" monster from your hand or Deck.
● Add 1 "White Veil" from your Deck to your hand.
②：When an attack is declared involving this card and an opponent's monster: Change that opponent's monster's ATK to 0.
③：If this card is destroyed by your opponent: Inflict 1000 damage to them.

name: Invincible Demise Lord
desc:
You can only use this card name's ① and ② effects once per turn each.
①：During the End Phase, if a monster(s) was destroyed by battle this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand or GY, and if "Invincible Demise Lord" was destroyed by battle this turn, this card's original ATK becomes 3000, also it cannot be destroyed by card effects.
②：During your Main Phase: You can reveal cards in your Deck, including "Slash Draw", equal to the number of cards your opponent controls +1 and place those revealed on the top of the Deck in any order.

name: Elemental HERO Clayguardman
desc:
1 "Elemental HERO" monster + 1 Warrior monster
You can only use this card name's ① effect once per turn.
①：If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Elemental HERO" monster from your Deck, then if your opponent controls a card, you can inflict 400 damage to them for each, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "HERO" monsters.
②：Other "Elemental HERO" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.

name: Doll Hammer
desc:
You can only use this card name's ① and ② effects once per turn each.
①：Target 1 monster you control; destroy it, and if you do, draw 2 cards, then you can change the battle position of 1 opponent's monster.
②：If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from your GY while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Quick Summon
desc:
You can only use this card name's ② effect once per turn.
①：Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon/Set 1 monster. When you do so this way, if your opponent controls a monster, you can Normal Summon a Level 5 or higher monster without Tributing.
②：During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 Level 5 or higher monster from your Deck or GY to your hand that can be Normal Summoned/Set, then immediately after this effect resolves, Tribute Summon it.

name: D-Burst
desc:
You can only activate 1 card with this card's name per turn.
①：Target 1 face-up Spell you control; destroy it, and if you do, draw 1 card, then if you control a "Destiny HERO" monster, you can Special Summon 1 "Destiny HERO" monster from your hand, GY, or banishment.
②：If a monster equipped with an Equip Card, or "Destiny HERO – Dogma", attacks, at the end of the Damage Step: You can banish this card from your GY; that monster can make a second attack in a row.

name: Annihilating Retrolight
desc:
①：When your opponent activates the effect of a monster they control that was not Summoned this turn: Negate the activation, then you can banish (face-down) all face-up monsters they control that were not Summoned this turn.
②：If this Set card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Set 1 Trap from your Deck.

name: Magical King of the Swamp
desc:
You can only use the effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：If this card is in your hand: You can reveal 1 Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck, and if you do, banish 1 material mentioned on it from your Deck, then Special Summon this card, and if it is used as Fusion Material this turn, its name can be treated as the banished monster's.

name: Witchcrafter Terracottan
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 "Witchcrafter" card in your GY, except "Witchcrafter Terracottan"; add it to your hand, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Witchcrafter" monsters.
②：During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 "Witchcrafter" monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field.

name: Witchcrafter Madame Rilliona
desc:
"Witchcrafter Madame Verre" + 2 Spellcaster monsters
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can Special Summon up to 3 Level 7 or lower "Witchcrafter" monsters with different Attributes from each other from your hand and/or Deck, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters.
②：During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can reveal 1 Spell in your hand; Special Summon this card in Defense Position.

name: Witchcrafter Celebration
desc:
You can only use 1 of the ① and ② effect of this card's name per turn, and only once that turn.
①：Activate 1 of these effects;
● Destroy 1 "Witchcrafter" monster you control and 1 card your opponent controls.
● Fusion Summon 1 "Witchcrafter" monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling Spellcaster monsters from your GY and/or banishment into the Deck.
②：During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY and you control a "Witchcrafter" monster: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Witchcrafter Walpurgis
desc:
You can only use the ① effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：During your Main Phase: You can add 1 "Witchcrafter" monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.
②：During your turn, if you would discard a card(s) to activate the effect of a "Witchcrafter" monster you control, you can send 1 "Witchcrafter" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY instead, except "Witchcrafter Walpurgis".

name: Witchcrafter Distortion
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated and you control a Level 5 or higher "Witchcrafter" monster: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
②：If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 Level 5 or higher Spellcaster monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.

name: Aleister the Reminiscent
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Spellcaster or Fusion Monster on the field; Special Summon this card, and if you do, that monster gains 1000 ATK until the end of this turn.
②：If this card is Normal or Special Summoned, or flipped face-up: You can banish 1 "Invoked" monster from your Extra Deck; add 1 "Invocation", or 1 Spell that mentions it, from your Deck to your hand.

name: Aiwass the Spirit of the Law
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can banish this card from your hand or field; add 1 "Aleister" monster from your Deck to your hand, then if this effect was activated on the field, immediately after it resolves, you can Normal Summon 1 Spellcaster monster.
②：If a face-up Fusion Monster(s) you control is sent to the GY, except by battle, while this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card, then you can Fusion Summon 1 "Invoked" monster, using monsters from your hand or field as material.

name: Virakam the Artificial Spirit
desc:
You can only use the ①, ②, and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If you have an "Aleister" monster in your field or GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.
②：If this card is Special Summoned: You can Set 1 "Invocation", or 1 Spell that mentions it, from your Deck.
③：When your opponent activates a card or effect in response to the activation of your Fusion Monster's effect (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from the field, and if you do, negate that opponent's effect, and if you do that, banish that card.

name: Invoked Sorath
desc:
1 "Aleister" monster + 1 FIRE or WIND monster
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Level 6 or lower monster in either GY; Special Summon it to your field in Defense Position, but its effects are negated.
②：If this card is in your GY: You can Fusion Summon 1 "Invoked" monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing its material from your field and/or GY, including this card in the GY.

name: Invoked Babalon
desc:
1 "Aleister" monster + 1 LIGHT or EARTH monster
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Virakam the Artificial Spirit" or "Magical Name – "Rosa Mundi"" from your Deck to your hand, then you can banish 1 monster from either GY.
②：You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Fusion Monster you control; all face-up monsters your opponent currently controls lose ATK equal to that monster's until the end of this turn.

name: Invoked Okeanos
desc:
1 "Aleister" monster + 1 DARK or WATER monster
You can only use the ③ effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：Your opponent's monsters cannot target monsters for attacks while this card is in the Main Monster Zone, except this one.
②：Any monster sent to your opponent's GY is banished instead while this card is in the Extra Monster Zone.
③：You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Fusion Monster you control; it can attack directly this turn.

name: Invoked Transcendence Aeon
desc:
2+ Fusion Monsters with different Attributes
You can only use 1 of the ① and ② effect of this card's name per turn, and only once that turn.
①：If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can banish cards from the field and/or GYs up to the number of materials used, then if you used 3 or more, you can look at your opponent's Extra Deck and banish up to 3 cards from it.
②：(Quick Effect): You can declare 1 Attribute; all other face-up monsters currently on the field become that Attribute until the end of this turn.

name: Invocation “Sword”
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Fusion Summon 1 monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control. If Summoning an "Invoked" monster, you can also use banished monsters, by returning them to the GY.
②：During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Aleister" monster or "Invocation" in your GY; shuffle this card into the Deck, and if you do, add that card to your hand.

name: Spirit Sword Aiwass
desc:
You can only activate 1 card with this card's name per turn.
①：Activate 1 of these effects; you cannot declare attacks for the rest of this turn, except with Fusion Monsters.
● Special Summon 1 "Aiwass the Spirit of the Law" from your Deck or GY.
● Send to the GY, or banish, 1 "Aleister" monster from your Deck.
● Look at 3 random face-down cards in your opponent's Extra Deck and banish 1 of them.

name: Magical Name – “Rosa Mundi”
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Banish 1 "Aleister" monster or 1 Fusion Monster from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Invoked" monster from your Extra Deck, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but banish it during the End Phase.
②：If a monster(s) becomes banished face-up while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card, then target 1 of your banished "Invoked" monsters; Special Summon it.

name: Plasma Blast
desc:
You can only activate 1 card with this card's name per turn.
①：Activate this effect based on whose turn it is;
● Yours: Place 1 Thunder or Rock monster from your Deck on the top of the Deck, then if you have a Thunder or Rock monster in your field or GY, you can destroy 1 card on the field.
● Your opponent's: Add 1 Thunder or Rock monster from your field, GY, or banishment to your hand, or, if a monster(s) was destroyed by battle or card effect this turn, you can add from your Deck instead.

name: June Pride – Elfnotes
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 Spellcaster non-Tuner
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：Neither player can declare attacks with monsters not in the center Main Monster Zones while this card is in the center Main Monster Zone.
②：During the Main Phase, if this card is in the center Main Monster Zone (Quick Effect): You can return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, Special Summon up to 1 "Elfnote" monster each from your hand, Deck, and/or GY.

name: Power Patron Envoy of Pure Prayers
desc:
2 non-Link Monsters
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Link Summoned and you have a "Power Patron" monster in your GY: You can add 1 "Theorealize" card from your Deck to your hand.
②：During the Main Phase, if you control another DARK Fairy monster, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Link Summon using materials you control, including this card.

name: Dead-End Power Patron Realm – Viraia
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Show 1 "Nerva the Power Patron of Creation", 1 "Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction", and 1 "Junora the Power Patron of Tuning" from your Extra Deck, face-up field, and/or GY, and if you do, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response the activation of your "Power Patron" monsters' effects this turn.
②：If you would banish the top card(s) of your Deck to activate the effect of a "Power Patron" monster you control, you can banish this card from your GY instead.

name: Pasto-Ral Theorealize
desc:
You can only use 1 of the ① and ② effect of this card's name per turn, and only once that turn.
①：If you control an "Artmage", "DoomZ", or "Elfnote" card: Special Summon 1 "Medius the Pure" from your hand or Deck. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effect when it is Summoned.
②：You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Monster in your GY; Special Summon it to your zone a Link Monster points to.

name: Power Patron Shadows of the End Times
desc:
You can only activate 1 card with this card's name per turn.
①：Special Summon 1 "Power Patron" monster from your hand, face-up Extra Deck, or GY, then you can apply these effects, in sequence, based on the number of monster card types (Fusion, Synchro, Xyz) you control.
● 1+: Banish the top 3 cards of your opponent's Deck face-down.
● 2+: Banish 1 card your opponent controls face-down.
● 3: Banish 1 random card from your opponent's hand face-down.

name: Elfnotes: Quatrain of Succession
desc:
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：The monster in your center Main Monster Zone cannot be banished by your opponent's card effects.
②：You can send 1 other Spell/Trap from your hand or field to the GY and declare a Level from 1 to 4; Special Summon 1 "Elfnote Seraphim Token" (Plant/Tuner/FIRE/ATK 0/DEF 0) with that Level, but you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck while that Token is on the field, except "Elfnote" monsters.

name: Ilios the Black Sun Dragon
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can reveal 3 Dragon monsters in your Extra Deck with 3000 or more ATK and different names; Special Summon this card from your hand.
②：If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 Dragon Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster you control; your opponent cannot target it with card effects this turn. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.

name: Protective Stone Gardenscaping
desc:
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：While you have 5 cards in your Spell & Trap Zone, any battle damage either player takes is halved, also, once per turn, you activate 1 Continuous Trap the turn it was Set.
②：During the Standby Phase: You can reveal 5 Continuous Traps with different names in your Deck, your opponent randomly picks 1 for you to Set, also shuffle the rest back into the Deck.

name: Oh my Trap Hole!
desc: ①：When a monster effect is activated on your opponent's field during the turn they Special Summoned a monster(s): Destroy the monster that activated that effect, then destroy all opponent's cards its adjacent Monster Zones and Spell & Trap Zones (if any).

name: Gray Layer
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effects of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can Tribute this card and reveal 1 Machine monster in your hand; add 1 Machine monster from your Deck to your hand with a different Attribute than the revealed monster, then, if it had 1200 or less ATK, you can Special Summon 1 Machine monster from your hand.
②：If your monster(s) is destroyed by card effect while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card; destroy 1 card on the field.

name: Lane Restriction
desc:
(Note: Temporarily unavailable)
(There is a serious bug in the implementation of this card's ② effect. Reports related to this effect will not be accepted at this time.)

①：When this card resolves, you can Special Summon 1 of your banished monsters to your rightmost Main Monster Zone.
②：If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) to their Main Monster Zone, they must use the leftmost usable zone(s).

name: Summer
desc:
①：Once per turn: You can place Season Counters on this card equal to the number of your opponent's unused Main Monster Zones.
②：Once per turn, when your monster declares an attack: You can inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each Season Counter on this card and "Spring" in your GY.
③：Once per turn, during your opponent's End Phase: You can place 1 Field Spell that you can place a Season Counter on from your hand or Deck face-up on your field, and if you do, place this card's Season Counters on it, but neither player can activate its effects this turn.

name: Rayrage, the Twilight Fiend
desc:
Pendulum Scale = 1
[ Pendulum Effect ]
You can only use the Pendulum Effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：If a Pendulum Monster(s) you control would be destroyed by an opponent's card effect, you can destroy this card instead of 1 of those monsters.
----------------------------------------
[ Monster Effect ]
You can only use the ① and ② monster effects of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Pendulum Monster you control; place it in your Pendulum Zone (but it cannot activate its Pendulum Effects this turn), and if you do, Special Summon this card.
②：(Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card, then target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects this turn.

name: Glitch Clutch Nullgainer
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can add 1 Level 8 or higher monster with 0 ATK from your Deck to your hand.
②：You can target 1 monster in your GY with 0 ATK; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated, also it cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon.

name: Breeze the Electrovore of Rkunas
desc: A mysterious dog that emits light for a brief moment by emitting its own life energy. After witnessing it, its endearing image is etched into your mind and never leaves you.

name: Astrolasma Urania
desc:
You can only Special Summon with the ① effect of this card's name once per turn. You can only use the ② and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning up to 2 monsters you control to the hand.
②：If this card is Special Summoned: You can reveal any number of monsters in your hand with different Levels, then target that many face-up cards your opponent controls; negate their effects.
③：If this card on the field is destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Zenna-no-Tsuinagihime
desc:
2+ Effect Monsters	
You can also use 1 monster in your hand as material to Link Summon this card. You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Link Summoned: You can send 1 monster from your Deck to the GY, or, if this card was Link Summoned using only monsters you controlled, you can send a monster from your Extra Deck instead.
②：During your next Standby Phase after this card was sent from your field to the GY: You can add 1 monster from your GY to your hand.

name: Spiritual Power Recovery Potion
desc:
This card is always treated as a "Possessed" card. You can only use 1 of the ① and ② effect of this card's name per turn, and only once that turn.
①：Banish any number of Spellcaster monsters and/or Spells from your GY; all face-up monsters you currently control gain 200 ATK for each card banished, also you gain 400 LP for each card banished.
②：During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon any number of Spellcaster monsters with different Attributes from your hand.

name: Funny Dark Rabbit
desc:
①：After this card is Normal or Special Summoned, during your Main Phase this turn, you can Normal Summon 1 monster that mentions "Toon World" in addition to your Normal Summon/Set (you can only gain this effect once per turn).
②：This card is treated as a Toon monster while "Toon World" is on the field.
③：Once per turn: You can add to your hand or place face-up on your field, 1 "Toon" Field or Continuous Spell from your Deck.

name: Comic Cat
desc:
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：This card is treated as a Toon monster while "Toon World" is on the field.
②：During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 monster (if you control "Toon World", you can Tribute 1 opponent's monster, even though you do not control it), and if you do, Special Summon 1 monster from your hand or Deck that mentions "Toon World", ignoring its Summoning conditions.

name: Evil Box
desc:
You can only use the ① effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：If you control "Toon World": You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add to your hand, or Set, 1 "Toon" Trap from your Deck.
②：This card is treated as a Toon monster while "Toon World" is on the field.
③：Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 card in either GY; place it on the bottom of the Deck.

name: Blue-Eyes Toon Ultimate Dragon
desc:
"Blue-Eyes Toon Dragon" + 2 Toon monsters
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck/Extra Deck.
①：Your Toon monsters can attack directly.
②：Once per turn: You can add 1 "Toon" card, or 1 card that mentions a "Toon" card's name, from your GY to your hand.
③：If your Toon monster is attacked, during damage calculation: You can banish it until the end of the Damage Step.

name: Toon World the Perfect World
desc:
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name thrice per turn.
①：This card's name becomes "Toon World" while in the Field Zone.
②：Once per turn: You can add 1 "Toon" card, or 1 card that mentions a "Toon" card's name, from your Deck to your hand.
③：Before resolving another activated card or effect, you can banish 1 Toon monster you control until immediately after that card/effect resolves, also you cannot banish monsters with that same original name with this effect of this card's name for the rest of this turn.

name: The Phantom Knights of Decayed Cloak
desc:
You can only use the ①, ②, and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can reveal 1 other "The Phantom Knights" card in your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand.
②：If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster from your Deck to your hand.
③：You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Xyz Monster you control; this turn, you can use it as material for an Xyz Summon using its Rank as if it were a Level.

name: The Phantom Knights of Doomed Solleret
desc:
You can only Special Summon with the ① effect of this card's name once per turn. You can only use the ② and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand).
②：If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Set 1 "The Phantom Knights" Spell/Trap from your Deck.
③：You can banish this card from your GY, then target up to 2 Level/Rank 3 DARK monsters you control; increase their Levels/Ranks by 1.

name: The Phantom Knights of Malevolent Scythe
desc:
2 Level 3 DARK monsters	
You can only use the ①, ②, and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can detach 1 material from this card; Special Summon 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster from your Deck.
②：If you Xyz Summon a "Xyz Dragon" monster while this monster is on the field: You can add 1 "Rank-Up-Magic" Spell from your Deck to your hand.
③：If this card is destroyed: You can add 1 of your banished "The Phantom Knights" cards to your hand, except an Xyz Monster.

name: The Phantom Knights’ Rank-Up-Magic Requiem
desc:
You can only activate 1 card with this card's name per turn.
①：Target 1 "The Phantom Knights" or "Xyz Dragon" monster in your GY or banishment; Special Summon it (but its effects are negated), then you can Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "The Phantom Knights" or "Xyz Dragon" Xyz Monster that is 1 Rank higher than a DARK Xyz Monster you control, by using that monster (this is treated as an Xyz Summon, transfer its materials).

name: The Phantom Knights of Umbrage Veil
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn. If you have a "The Phantom Knights" monster on your field or in your GY, you can activate this card the turn it was Set.
①：Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster (Warrior/DARK/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 300) in Defense Position (it is NOT treated as a Trap), then you can change 1 opponent's Attack Position monster to Defense Position.
②：You can banish this card from your GY; immediately after this effect resolves, Xyz Summon 1 DARK monster.

name: Wisca Blitzclique
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If a card(s) was destroyed by your "Blitzclique" card's effect this turn (Quick Effect): You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon up to 3 Thunder monsters from your hand, then you can destroy up to the same number of cards on the field, also you cannot Special Summon Effect Monsters for the rest of this turn, except from the hand.
②：When a monster effect is activated, except in the hand (Quick Effect): You can return 1 other Thunder monster you control to the hand; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy the activating monster.

name: Surge Blitzclique
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can reveal this card in your hand, then target 1 monster on the field; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Thunder monster from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon Effect Monsters for the rest of this turn, except from the hand.
②：If another card(s) on the field is destroyed by card effect while this monster is on the field: You can add 1 "Blitzclique" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Surge Blitzclique".

name: Crack Blitzclique
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：When your opponent activates a monster effect on the field during their turn (Quick Effect): You can reveal this card in your hand; destroy that monster, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Thunder monster from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon Effect Monsters for the rest of this turn, except from the hand.
②：If another card(s) is destroyed by card effect while this monster is on the field: You can send 1 "Blitzclique" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY.

name: Grain Blitzclique
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can reveal this card in your hand, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Thunder monster from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon Effect Monsters for the rest of this turn, except from the hand.
②：If another card(s) is destroyed by card effect while this monster is on the field: You can add 1 "Blitzclique" Spell or "Kowloon, Citadel of the Sky" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Emi Blitzclique
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can reveal it, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Thunder monster from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon Effect Monsters for the rest of this turn, except from the hand.
②：If another card(s) is destroyed by card effect while this monster is on the field: You can add 1 "Blitzclique" Trap from your Deck to your hand.

name: Kowloon, Citadel of the Sky
desc:
You can only use the ② and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Your monsters Normal or Special Summoned from the hand gain 500 ATK/DEF.
②：During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 "Mechbeast Token" (Machine/EARTH/Level 6/ATK 2000/DEF 2000) to your opponent's field, and if you do, add 1 "Blitzclique" monster from your Deck to your hand.
③：If a card(s) is destroyed by your "Blitzclique" card's effect while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Blitzclique – Breakaway
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Activate 1 of these effect;
● Place 1 "Blitzclique" Continuous Trap from your Deck face-up on your field.
● Return 1 Thunder monster you control to the hand, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
②：If a card(s) is destroyed by your "Blitzclique" card's effect while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Blitzclique – Stepped Leader
desc:
You can only use the ①, ②, and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If a card(s) is destroyed by your "Blitzclique" card's effect: You can target 1 Thunder monster in your GY; add it to your hand.
②：During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 Thunder monster from your hand, then destroy this card.
③：If a card(s) is destroyed by your "Blitzclique" card's effect while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Blitzclique – Return Stroke
desc:
You can only use the ② and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①："Blitzclique" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
②：When your opponent activates a Spell Card or effect: You can return 1 "Blitzclique" monster you control to the hand; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
③：You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Blitzclique" monster you control or in your GY; return it to the hand.

name: Blitzclique – Alternator
desc:
You can only use the ② and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Monsters your opponent controls lose 300 ATK/DEF for each Thunder monster you control.
②：You can shuffle 1 other "Blitzclique" card from your hand or face-up on your field into the Deck; add 1 Thunder monster with a different name from your Deck to your hand.
③：You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Blitzclique" Spell or "Kowloon, Citadel in the Sky" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Uria, Lord of Searing Flames – Sacred Beast of Cataclysmic Fire
desc:
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with a "Sacred Beast" card. You can only use the ① effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Sacred Beast" Trap from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.
②：Gains 1000 ATK/DEF for each Trap in the GYs.
③：Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy it. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.

name: Hamon, Lord of Striking Thunder – Sacred Beast of Sinful Catastrophe
desc:
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with a "Sacred Beast" card. You can only use the ① effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Sacred Beast" Spell from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.
②：Once per turn, if a monster(s) is sent to your opponent's GY: Inflict 1000 damage to them.
③：If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can activate this effect; you take no damage for the rest of this turn.

name: Raviel, Lord of Phantasms – Sacred Beast of Endless Eternity
desc:
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with a "Sacred Beast" card. You can only use the ① effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Raviel, Lord of Phantasms – Sacred Beast of Endless Eternity", then discard 1 card.
②：Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 2 other "Sacred Beast" monsters; destroy as many monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, this card gains 1000 ATK for each card destroyed by this effect.

name: The Orchestrator of the Sacred Beasts
desc:
You can only use the ①, ②, and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：You can reveal this card in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster.
②：You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand or GY in Defense Position, except a Level 8 monster or the discarded card.
③：You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your GY in Defense Postion, except a Level 8 monster.

name: Martyr of the Sacred Beasts
desc:
You can only use the ①, ②, and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can place 1 "Sacred Beast" Field Spell or Continuous Spell/Trap from your Deck face-up on your field.
②：If you control another "Sacred Beast" monster: You can Special Summon 2 "Martyr of the Sacred Beasts" from your hand, Deck, and/or GY.
③：During your opponent's End Phase, if this card and a Level 10 "Sacred Beast" monster are in your GY: You can add this card to your hand.

name: Phantasmal Sacred Beasts of Chaos
desc:
3 Level 10 monsters that cannot be Normal Summoned/Set
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by sending the above cards you control to the GY. You can only Special Summon "Phantasmal Sacred Beasts of Chaos" once per turn this way, no matter which method you use.
①：The first two times this card would be destroyed by card effect each turn, it is not destroyed.
②：Thrice per turn and once per Chain (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then you can gain LP equal to half its ATK.

name: Unleashing the Sacred Beasts
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Add 3 "Sacred Beast" monsters with different names from your Deck to your hand, then discard 2 cards.
②：If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 Level 10 Pyro, Thunder, or Fiend monster that cannot be Normal Summoned/Set from your Deck to your hand.

name: Fallen Paradise of the Sacred Beasts
desc:
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：Thrice per turn: You can send 3 other cards of the same type (Monster, Spell, Trap) from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY, then you can Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand, Deck, GY, or banishment, and if you do, it is unaffected by your opponent's activated Spell/Trap effects.
②：If you control a "Sacred Beast" monster whose original Level is 10: You can draw 2 cards.

name: Skyfire of the Sacred Beast
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：During your Main Phase: You can place 2 "Skyfire of the Sacred Beast" from your hand, Deck, and/or GY face-up on your field, then you can reveal 1 Level 10 "Sacred Beast" monster in your hand, then you can place 1 "Fallen Paradise of the Sacred Beasts" from your Deck face-up in your Field Zone.
②：During your opponent's End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can add it to your hand.

name: Destruction Chant of the Sacred Beast
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：Special Summon 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your hand or GY in Defense Position, then, if you control 2 or more "Sacred Beast" monsters whose original Level is 10, you can negate the effects of 1 face-up card your opponent controls, and if you do, destroy it.
②：You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Phantasm" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field.

name: Divine Abyss of the Sacred Beast
desc:
You can only use the ① and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：During the Main Phase: You can place 2 "Divine Abyss of the Sacred Beast" from your hand, Deck, and/or GY face-up on your field.
②：You can send 3 face-up "Divine Abyss of the Sacred Beast" you control to the GY, including this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change it to face-down Defense Position.
③：During your opponent's End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can place it on the bottom of the Deck.

name: Crew Clan Hat
desc:
Pendulum Scale = 7
[ Pendulum Effect ]
You can only use the Pendulum Effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Crew Clan" card from your Deck to your GY, except a Pendulum Monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot activate the effects of monsters Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck until the end of the next turn.
----------------------------------------
[ Monster Effect ]
①：Monsters your opponent controls lose 1500 DEF while you control a Tribute Summoned monster.
②：If this card is Tributed: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of this card's name once per turn);
● Shuffle all Pendulum Monsters on the field and face-up in the Extra Decks into the Deck.
● Special Summon 1 non-Pendulum "Crew Clan" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck, ignoring its Summoning conditions.

name: Crew Clan Drish
desc:
2 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, and/or Pendulum Monsters	
①：Your Tribute Summoned monsters can make a second attack during each Battle Phase.
②：If this card is Tributed: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of this card's name once per turn);
● Return all Link Monsters on the field and in the GYs to the Extra Deck.
● Each player shuffles their entire hand into the Deck, then they draw the same number of cards they shuffled.

name: Crew Clan “Finale”
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If you control a Tribute Summoned monster: Discard any number of cards, then target that many face-up cards on the field; destroy them.
②：You can banish this card from your GY and Tribute 1 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, Pendulum, or Link Monster from your hand or field; add 1 "Clown Clan" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand whose original Level/Rank/Link Rating is not equal to the Tributed monster's.

name: Black Chaos the Ultimate Magical Swordsman
desc:
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by shuffling 1 Spellcaster or Warrior Ritual Monster from your hand or GY into the Deck. You can only Special Summon "Black Chaos the Ultimate Magical Swordsman" once per turn this way.
①：You can discard this card; place 1 Continuous Trap that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your Deck or GY on your field face-up.
②：Unaffected by your opponent's activated card effects while you have a Ritual Spell in your GY.
③：Once per turn: You can banish 2 cards your opponent controls.

name: Skull Archfiend of Chaos
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 3 cards in the GYs and/or face-up banishment, including a card that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" other than "Skull Archfiend of Chaos"; place them on the bottom of the Deck in any order, and if you do, Special Summon this card.
②：If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 Ritual Spell from your hand or Deck to the GY; add 1 Ritual Monster mentioned on it from your Deck to your hand.

name: Mystical Celtic Sage
desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can activate this effect; you can only Special Summon from the Extra Deck once for the rest of this turn, also reveal your entire hand, and if there is a card that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" in it, you can draw 3 cards, then discard 2 cards.
②：You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Ritual Monster that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your hand.

name: Gurifoh
desc:
You can only use the ① effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：(Quick Effect): You can discard this card, then activate 1 of these effects;
● The next battle or effect damage you would take this turn becomes 0.
● Set 1 Quick-Play Spell or Trap that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your Deck. It can be activated this turn.
②：For the Ritual Summon of exactly 1 Level 8 monster with a card effect that requires use of monsters, this card can be used as the entire Tribute.

name: Ritual of Light and Darkness
desc:
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name once per turn.
①：Ritual Summon 1 "Black Chaos the Dark Chaos Magician" or "Black Luster Soldier – Soldier of Light and Darkness" from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field and/or banishing monsters from your GY, whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level.
②：If this card is in your GY: You can add it and 1 card that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your GY to your hand.

name: Mystic Box of Chaos
desc:
①：When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets another card(s) you control: Return 1 of those cards you control to the hand (if Set, reveal it), and if you do, destroy 1 card on the field, then you can Special Summon 1 monster that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your hand, with a different name from the returned card, ignoring its Summoning conditions.
②：If this card is destroyed by your opponent: You can Special Summon 1 Ritual Monster that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your hand or Deck.

name: Chaos Hats
desc: ①：When your opponent activates a Normal Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect: Choose 3 Spells/Traps with different names from each other from your Deck and 1 monster in your Main Monster Zone that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness", and if you do, Special Summon the chosen Spells/Traps as Normal Monsters (Spellcaster/DARK/Level 8/ATK 0/DEF 0) whose name is "Chaos Hats" in face-down Defense Position, Set the chosen monster, and shuffle them on the field, then your opponent's activated effect becomes "destroy 1 opponent's Set monster".

name: Mind Shuffle
desc:
You can only use the ① effect of this card's name once per turn. You cannot activate this card's ① and ② effect in the same Chain.
①：During either player's turn: You can add 1 monster that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.
②：When your opponent activates a card or effect: You can return 1 Level 7 or higher monster you control to the hand; Special Summon 1 monster with a different name from your hand that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness", ignoring its Summoning conditions.

name: Black Chaos the Dark Chaos Magician
desc:
You can Ritual Summon this card with "Ritual of Light and Darkness"
You can only use the ① and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell from your GY to your hand.
②：Unaffected by your opponent's activated effects, unless they target this card. Spells/Traps you control cannot be destroyed, or banished, by your opponent's card effects.
③：You can target 1 card your opponent controls; banish it face-down.

name: Black Luster Soldier – Soldier of Light and Darkness
desc:
You can Ritual Summon this card with "Ritual of Light and Darkness"
You can only use the ① and ③ effect of this card's name each once per turn.
①：If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 card your opponent controls; banish it.
②：Cannot be destroyed by battle. Unaffected by your opponent's activated effects, unless they target this card.
②：When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can make it gain 1500 ATK, and if you do, it can make a second attack in a row.
